name: Keylogger Installation or Execution
description: Detects known keylogging tools or keylog-related command patterns
query:
// Detect keylogging tools and techniques
// Trigger on known keylogger binaries or API usage
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(GetAsyncKeyState|SetWindowsHookEx|Get-Keystrokes|keylog|logkeys|xinput|xdotool.*key)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 120 seconds
